content:
First note that the given condition is

 p(5)+p(25)=1906.

Write 
 p(x)=ax³+bx²+cx+d.
Then

p(5)=125a+25b+5c+d,  
p(25)=15625a+625b+25c+d,

so

(125+15625)a+(25+625)b+(5+25)c+2d=1906  
⇔15750a+650b+30c+2d=1906  
⇔7875a+325b+15c+d=953.       (*)

We want p(15)=3375a+225b+15c+d.  From (*) we have  
d=953−7875a−325b−15c,  

so

p(15)=3375a+225b+15c+(953−7875a−325b−15c)  
 =953−(7875−3375)a−(325−225)b  
 =953−4500a−100b  
 =953−100(45a+b).  

Set t=45a+b.  Since a,b are arbitrary integers, t runs over all integers, and

p(15)=953−100t.

We want to make |953−100t| as small as possible by choosing an integer t.  The multiples of 100 nearest 953 are 900 (t=9) and 1000 (t=10), giving

|953−900|=53, |953−1000|=47.

Thus the minimum possible value of |p(15)| is 47.  

Answer: \boxed{47}.

message.content:
First note that the given condition is

 p(5)+p(25)=1906.

Write 
 p(x)=ax³+bx²+cx+d.
Then

p(5)=125a+25b+5c+d,  
p(25)=15625a+625b+25c+d,

so

(125+15625)a+(25+625)b+(5+25)c+2d=1906  
⇔15750a+650b+30c+2d=1906  
⇔7875a+325b+15c+d=953.       (*)

We want p(15)=3375a+225b+15c+d.  From (*) we have  
d=953−7875a−325b−15c,  

so

p(15)=3375a+225b+15c+(953−7875a−325b−15c)  
 =953−(7875−3375)a−(325−225)b  
 =953−4500a−100b  
 =953−100(45a+b).  

Set t=45a+b.  Since a,b are arbitrary integers, t runs over all integers, and

p(15)=953−100t.

We want to make |953−100t| as small as possible by choosing an integer t.  The multiples of 100 nearest 953 are 900 (t=9) and 1000 (t=10), giving

|953−900|=53, |953−1000|=47.

Thus the minimum possible value of |p(15)| is 47.  

Answer: \boxed{47}.
